basic_details.job_title: CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Technical Officer and Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: The CSIR-Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute (CSIR CEERI) Technical Officer and Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 21-05-2026 on the official website ceeri.res.in. A total of 22 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR CEERI Technical Officer and Technician 2026 Recruitment.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum age is 18 years. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBDs.
age_limit.details: Minimum age is 18 years as on the last date for submission of online application. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBDs.

qualification.details: Technical Officer (TO-1): B.E./ B.Tech. or equivalent in Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Electronics and Communication Engineering & Electronics Engineering with minimum 55% marks. OR M. Sc. or equivalent in Physics/ Electronics/ Applied Electronics with minimum 55% marks. Technical Officer (TO-2): B.E./B.Tech./ M.Sc or equivalent in Computer Science with minimum 55% marks. OR MCA* with minimum 55% marks. Technician (1) (TECH-1): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Electronics Mechanic. OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Electronics Mechanic. OR 3 years of work experience in Electronics Mechanic. Technician (1) (TECH-2): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. OR 3 years of work experience in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. Technician (1) (TECH-3): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Mason (Building Constructor). OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Mason (Building Constructor). OR 3 years of work experience in Mason (Building Constructor). Technician (1) (TECH-4): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Draughtsman (Civil). OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Draughtsman (Civil). OR 3 years of work experience in Draughtsman (Civil).

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 7 (₹89,268/- Approx.) for Technical Officer and Pay Level-2 (₹19,900-₹63,200) for Technician.
salary_details.details: Technical Officer: Pay Level 7 (₹89,268/- Approx.) Technician (1): Pay Level-2 (₹19,900-₹63,200)

selection_process: Screening based on online applications Trade Test/ Written Test (Paper-I
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CEERI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

Minimum age is 18 years. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBDs.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CEERI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR CEERI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Technical Officer (TO-1): B.E./ B.Tech. or equivalent in Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Electronics and Communication Engineering & Electronics Engineering with minimum 55% marks. OR M. Sc. or equivalent in Physics/ Electronics/ Applied Electronics with minimum 55% marks. Technical Officer (TO-2): B.E./B.Tech./ M.Sc or equivalent in Computer Science with minimum 55% marks. OR MCA* with minimum 55% marks. Technician (1) (TECH-1): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Electronics Mechanic. OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Electronics Mechanic. OR 3 years of work experience in Electronics Mechanic. Technician (1) (TECH-2): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. OR 3 years of work experience in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. Technician (1) (TECH-3): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Mason (Building Constructor). OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Mason (Building Constructor). OR 3 years of work experience in Mason (Building Constructor). Technician (1) (TECH-4): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Draughtsman (Civil). OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Draughtsman (Civil). OR 3 years of work experience in Draughtsman (Civil).

content_sections.heading: CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age is 18 years as on the last date for submission of online application. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBDs.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Technical Officer: Pay Level 7 (₹89,268/- Approx.) Technician (1): Pay Level-2 (₹19,900-₹63,200)

content_sections.heading: CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening based on online applications Trade Test/ Written Test (Paper-I, Paper-II, Paper-III)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CEERI Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CEERI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 is 08 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies announced for the posts of Technical Officer and Technician in CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for Technician posts?
faq.answer: For Technician posts, the minimum qualification is Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard with Science subjects and a minimum of 55% marks, along with an ITI certificate or equivalent experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all candidates applying for CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 is ₹500/-. This fee is to be paid online.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST candidates, 3 years for OBC candidates, and 10 years for PwBDs.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening based on online applications followed by a Trade Test or Written Test, which includes Paper-I, Paper-II, and Paper-III.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for a Technical Officer at CSIR CEERI?
faq.answer: The Technical Officer post is placed in Pay Level 7, with an approximate salary of ₹89,268/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply for more than one post?
faq.answer: Yes, you can apply for more than one post, but a separate application must be submitted for each post code.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed via the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
